creator: rodrigc@crodrigues.org
text:
Hi,

The patch you submitted doesn't look fully baked.
I'll wait until you get more feedback from the apr team.
When you submit a patch:

-> don't submit unnecessary whitespace chagnes
-> why did you remove the patch for apr_hints.m4?  That patch is
   necessary for the chroot'd environment for how the
   ports cluster builds this port


-- 
Craig Rodrigues
rodrigc@crodrigues.org
